dict.string: ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Microphone access lets the claude CLI and voice-dictation tools you use inside a session capture your voice.
ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Speech-recognition access lets voice-dictation tools you use inside a session transcribe your speech into the terminal.
ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Downloads-folder access lets the claude CLI and tools you use inside a session read and write files there on your behalf.
ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Documents-folder access lets the claude CLI and tools you use inside a session read and write files there on your behalf.
ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Desktop-folder access lets the claude CLI and tools you use inside a session read and write files there on your behalf.
ReCue runs agent sessions in the terminal. Removable-volume access lets the claude CLI and tools you use inside a session read and write files on mounted drives on your behalf.
